The menu

Pick a treat. Then, probably, one more.

Every item comes in classic and gluten-free versions, all from a nut-free kitchen. Tap any treat to order it on Bakesy.

Our story
“I truly believe that cookies are love.”

I was known in my community for my cooking — but when I had twins with severe food allergies, I decided to try my hand at baking. My goal was simple: make treats for my kids that were as good as, or better than, not just the best gluten-free options, but the classic ones too.

After plenty of trial and error — and feedback from some tough critics (the kids and their friends) — I perfected both the classic and gluten-free versions of many old favorites, plus a few creations of my own.

Now, after 15 years of spreading love through baking in my community, I’m bringing you my most popular cookies, brownies, and sweet treats straight from my home kitchen.

— The baker behind One More Flavor
